goal: Conduct a comprehensive technical audit of the SonicMaster AI mastering workflow within the More-Phi VST3 plugin
scope: SonicMasterAnalysisEngine — audio analysis pipeline (frequency, dynamics, loudness, spectral, phase)
AutoMasteringEngine — plan application to parameter chains
Related parameter bridge, plugin host integration for mastering
allowed_operations: Read source files, headers, and documentation
Search for symbols and patterns with grep/code_index
success_criteria: Audio analysis verification: identify what measurements are taken, assess accuracy/completeness vs professional standards
Mastering plan evaluation: trace from analysis output → plan generation → whether plan logically addresses issues
Parameter implementation audit: trace from plan → parameter settings → whether values, ranges, and ordering are correct
Quality assessment: identify potential artifacts, phase issues, or side effects from the implementation
Audit report with specific findings, correct vs failed instances, technical details on misconfigurations, and recommendations
verification_gates: All SonicMaster source files read and understood
All mastering-related source files read and understood
Signal flow traced end-to-end from audio in to parameter out
